Friday 9th April 2021

Yesterday I rinsed 100x 15ml falcon centrifuge tubes with plastic lids and have left them at the QMUL geography lab to dry. These will be collected for fieldwork on Monday or Tuesday.

Today: I will complete the bioinformatics course I've been following (https://mibwurrepo.github.io/Microbial-bioinformatics-introductory-course-Material-2018/core-microbiota.html) and then continue (and get as much done as I can) of The New Statistics with R by Andy Hector. I hope to finish the Hector book on Monday so I can bring together all of my statistical analyses into one coherent plan!
